sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_identity (id Int32, value Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_identity (id, value) VALUES (1, identity(100)), (2, identity(200));
UPDATE test_identity SET value = identity(value + 10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, identity(value) AS identity_value FROM test_identity WHERE identity(value) > identity(150);
SELECT identity(SUM(value)) AS total_value FROM test_identity;
